sessionStart.command: command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[failproofai] node not found; install Node >=20.9' >&2; exit 2; }; node scripts/dev-hook.mjs --hook sessionStart --cli cursor

postToolUse.command: command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[failproofai] node not found; install Node >=20.9' >&2; exit 2; }; node scripts/dev-hook.mjs --hook postToolUse --cli cursor

stop.command: command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[failproofai] node not found; install Node >=20.9' >&2; exit 1; }; node scripts/dev-hook.mjs --hook stop --cli cursor
